Frequently Asked Questions
I’m switching from a PC to a Mac. Is it easy to set up my new Mac and transfer my files?
Yes, switching to Mac is simple and learning how to use Mac feels just as easy as using your iPhone. Mac pairs seamlessly with your iPhone and other Apple devices.
If you already have an iPhone, setting up your Mac is simple. Just bring your iPhone near your Mac, and Setup Assistant signs you in to your Wi-Fi network and Apple Account. Your files, photos, messages, passwords and more are transferred from iCloud directly to your new Mac.
Don’t have an iPhone? No problem. With Migration Assistant pre‑installed on every Mac, you can easily transfer your documents, apps, accounts and settings from a PC or an existing Mac. Once the transfer is complete, everything will be ready on your new Mac.
Need more help? With Personal Setup, you get free online, one-to-one sessions with a Specialist who walks you through setup and shows you how to make the most of your new Mac. Best of all, you can join whenever works for you, from wherever you are.
Does Apple offer any special discounts or promotions to higher-education students, parents and teachers?
Apple has an Education Store dedicated to your needs. You’ll find discounts, promotions and bundle deals on Mac, iPad, software and accessories. You can also access tools and resources to learn how you can better use your Apple devices, software and apps to enhance learning and teaching.
Products eligible for education discounts are marked with a graduation cap icon. You may need to verify your elig

Frequently Asked Questions
I’m switching from a PC to a Mac. Is it easy to set up my new Mac and transfer my files?
Yes, switching to Mac is simple and learning how to use Mac feels just as easy as using your iPhone. Mac pairs seamlessly with your iPhone and other Apple devices.
If you already have an iPhone, setting up your Mac is simple. Just bring your iPhone near your Mac, and Setup Assistant signs you in to your Wi-Fi network and Apple Account. Your files, photos, messages, passwords and more are transferred from iCloud directly to your new Mac.
Don’t have an iPhone? No problem. With Migration Assistant pre‑installed on every Mac, you can easily transfer your documents, apps, accounts and settings from a PC or an existing Mac. Once the transfer is complete, everything will be ready on your new Mac.
Need more help? With Personal Setup, you get free online, one-to-one sessions with a Specialist who walks you through setup and shows you how to make the most of your new Mac. Best of all, you can join whenever works for you, from wherever you are.
Does Apple offer any special discounts or promotions to higher-education students, parents and teachers?
Apple has an Education Store dedicated to your needs. You’ll find discounts, promotions and bundle deals on Mac, iPad, software and accessories. You can also access tools and resources to learn how you can better use your Apple devices, software and apps to enhance learning and teaching.

Powered by the most advanced Apple silicon, Mac Studio is the ultimate pro desktop. With massive CPU core updates, mind-bending graphics, increased memory, blazing-fast Thunderbolt 5 connectivity and next-level AI capabilities, Mac Studio is the beast that’s built to deliver.
Go inside M4 Max and M3 Ultra
Choose your superpower.
With M4 Max and M3 Ultra, Mac Studio unleashes the full speed and capabilities of Apple silicon. Packed with the most unified memory and ultrafast SSD storage ever available in a Mac, both chips introduce Dynamic Caching and hardware-accelerated mesh shading to fast-track all kinds of pro workflows. Hardware-accelerated ray tracing enables unbelievably realistic graphics for gaming, game development and 3D rendering. And a faster Neural Engine works with the entire system to boost on-device AI tasks — no matter how advanced.
M4 Max
With phenomenal single- and multithreaded performance and enhanced machine learning accelerators, M4 Max brings the world’s fastest CPU core to whatever you set out to do — from professional music production and photography to video editing and coding.
